description:
Legal notes in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (1100–38 CE).

(a) ʿAzzūz bt. Yefet/Ḥasan known as Ibn כתרתאן(?) al-Zajjāj, the widow of [...] Elʿazar ha-Levi known as Ibn al-Amʿaṭ, sold to her son Bū Saʿīd a number of items (טסת ומתארה והאון ודסת . . .) for 3 dinars.

(b) Something involving Rayyisa bt. Elʿazar the wife of Meshullam known Abū l-Ḥusayn b. Yisraʾel. 

(c) Details of a sale of a female slave. Seller: ʿĀliya bt. Moshe ha-Kohen known as Saniyy al-Dawla (the father and some of his offspring, including ʿĀliya's sister Zayn, are mentioned also in T-S 12.104 (PGPID 16119) and T-S 16.188 (PGPID 3437); the latter is also the sale of a slave). Buyer: Shemuel b. Shelomo ha-Sar known as al-Dustarī (appears also in T-S 10J7.10).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
